_comment: SYNCED SNAPSHOT — do not hand-edit. Regenerate with: node scripts/sync-workflow-catalog.mjs (pulls api.esy.com GET /v1/catalog/workflows). Mirrors the platform's published, versioned workflow templates.

items.name: Generate Clip Art Asset
items.description: Generate an internal ESY visual artifact using the clip.art prompt/style contract, provider runtime policy, ESY R2 storage, and review-ready metadata.
items.shortDescription: Generate a reviewable internal clip-art asset.
whatYouGet: ESY R2 raw and processed storage references

items.name: Generate Research Infographic
items.description: Produce a vertical infographic that visualizes a research report. Invokes the Generate Research Report workflow as a sub-workflow, then renders its findings as an image with gpt-image-2.
items.shortDescription: Turn a research report into a vertical infographic.

items.name: Generate Research Report
items.description: Produce a structured, cited research report on a topic using LLM synthesis. Reusable on its own or as a sub-workflow feeding other artifacts.
items.shortDescription: Synthesize a structured, cited research report.
